faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Hempstead typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Hempstead and surrounding Long Island areas. Our local technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin treatment immediately.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait station placement, removal of rats, sanitation of affected areas, exclusion work to seal entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are rats common in Hempstead homes and businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, rats are a common problem in Hempstead due to the area's dense population, older building stock, abundant food sources, and proximity to parks and water sources. Both Norway rats and roof rats are frequently found in residential and commercial properties throughout the area.
